productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Vines Blue Flip Flops
description: This whimsical flip flops from adidas, aptly names Vines is for the footloose at heart. With contrast printing on the footbed, this footwear is sure to brighten up your day! Wear this with denims and off-duty tops. Upper PU footbed with printed design and branding Rubber thong style foot straps and fabric toe separator Stripes along the straps for style Outsole Textured TPR outsole for grip and traction Flip Flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
